Remodel · Retail / Food & Beverage

French Truck Coffee

Remodel of a 3,150 sqft building — now home to FTC's roasting facility, kitchen and coffee spot. Go for the Nola Iced.

2017

Remodel · Retail / Restaurant

Soji: Modern Asian

5050 Government St · Baton Rouge, LA 70806

Remodel of a 3,200 sqft building including The Lotus Lounge. The interior will make your jaw drop — nothing like it in BR. But if you want to see it, you'll have to go for yourself. Nab a Sunkissed Roll when you go. You won't regret it.

2023

Acquisition · Office Remodel

Carbo Landscape Architecture

6633 Government St · Baton Rouge, LA 70806

Acquired the Carco Awards property in 2020. In 2023, the owners decided it was time to retire — we procured Carbo Landscape Architecture and completed a turnkey office remodel. Turned out pretty cool. Glad, cause the people inside are just as rad.
